renderer.description: Renderer-resource thresholds. `soft` emits a warning, `hard` fails `engine doctor` with exit code 1.

softLargestChunkGzipKb.description: Soft ceiling for the largest non-vendor (main) chunk in `dist/assets`. `engine doctor` emits a warning when crossed.

hardLargestChunkGzipKb.description: Hard ceiling for the largest non-vendor (main) chunk. `engine doctor` exits non-zero when crossed. Vendor chunks (e.g. Rapier WASM, Three.js) are weighed against `bundle.vendors` overrides or DEFAULT_VENDOR_BUDGETS instead.

vendors.description: Per-vendor chunk budgets keyed by Rollup chunk-name prefix (matches scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs). When omitted, doctor falls back to built-in default vendor budgets so a lazy-loaded Rapier chunk does not fail a project that only enforces a main-chunk budget.

lights.description: M21-light-budgets: max simultaneously active ECS Light entities. Catches scenes that grow runaway lights through HMR or procedural spawning.

shadowCasters.description: M21-light-budgets: max ECS Lights with castShadow=true. Each shadow caster adds at least one shadow pass per frame.
